exhibits.name: List of State Administrators / Agents for Service of Process
Operating Agreement with Undertaking and Guarantee, Ownership Addendum, Relocation Addendum, Renewal Addendum, and State Addenda (IL, MN, ND, WA)
exhibits.notes: 62 pages. Contains the full franchise agreement (also referred to as 'Operating Agreement'), personal undertaking and guarantee, ownership addendum, relocation addendum, renewal addendum, and state-specific contract addenda for Illinois, Minnesota, North Dakota, and Washington. This is the primary operative contract.

exhibits.name: Conversion Addenda
exhibits.notes: Addenda for soft-serve only conversions and NSF conversions. Governs CLF and SPF rates for conversion franchisees.

exhibits.name: Franchise Application
exhibits.notes: 13 pages. Application form for prospective franchisees.

exhibits.name: Third-Party Agreements Related to EPOS System
exhibits.notes: 124 pages. Participation agreements with ParTech, ValueLink, Olo, Punchh, Acumera, Cineplex, and related third-party technology vendors. Governs EPOS system, mobile ordering, loyalty, gift cards, firewall, and digital menu boards.

exhibits.name: Design Services Agreement
exhibits.notes: 10 pages. Governs design intent plans and architectural services for store development.

exhibits.name: Construction Consultation Services Agreement
exhibits.notes: 5 pages. Governs construction consultation services during store buildout.

exhibits.name: Tables of Contents for Manuals
exhibits.notes: 6 pages. Tables of contents for ADQ's Operations Manual (225 pages total). Confidential and proprietary.

exhibits.name: List of Franchises (Current Franchisees)
exhibits.notes: 42 pages. All operational direct-licensed and subfranchised DQ Treat and DQ soft-serve only franchises as of December 31, 2024.

exhibits.name: List of Former Franchisees
exhibits.notes: 7 pages. 30 former franchisees (20 direct-licensed, 10 subfranchised territory operator) — terminated, canceled, not renewed, or ceased during FY2024 or not communicated within 10 weeks.

exhibits.name: Financial Statements (with Guarantee of Performance)
exhibits.notes: 20 pages. IDQ consolidated financial statements (Dec 31, 2024 and 2023; years ended Dec 31, 2024, 2023, 2022). Auditor: Deloitte & Touche LLP. Opinion: Unqualified. No going concern. Includes balance sheet, income statement, equity statement, cash flows, and 12 notes to financial statements. Guarantee of Performance on final page.

exhibits.name: Receipts
exhibits.notes: 4 pages. Two detachable acknowledgment of receipt copies.

state_addenda_in_body.notes: TOC lists Texas but no Texas addendum found in body. Maryland is present in body but not listed in TOC. This is a document-internal inconsistency.

state_addenda_in_exhibit_b.notes: Contract-level addenda modifying the Operating Agreement for these states.
